recipes.name: $4 Spaghetti
ingredients: 3/4cup peeled garlic cloves (4 ounces, from about 4 heads)
Two 28-oz cans peeled Italian tomatoes with their juices
Freshly grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, for serving
recipes.instructions:
1. Bring the mushrooms and 3 cups of water to a boil. Simmer over moderate heat until the broth is reduced to 1 cup, 1 hour. Strain and discard the mushrooms
2. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, bring the garlic and olive oil to a boil. Simmer over moderately low heat, stirring, until the garlic is very tender and golden, about 30 minutes
3. In a Dutch oven, bring the tomatoes and the garlic and oil to a boil. Add the mushroom broth and, using an immersion blender, puree the sauce until smooth
4. Bring the sauce back to a boil, then simmer over moderately low heat until thickened, about 1 hour. Season the sauce with salt and pepper
5. Cook the spaghetti in a large pot of salted boiling water until al dente. Drain the spaghetti and return to the pot. Add 2 cups of the sauce and cook, tossing, for 1 minute. Transfer the spaghetti to bowls, top with the basil and serve with grated cheese
recipes.comments: From Chef Roy Choi

recipes.name: Ajitama soft boiled eggs
ingredients: 6 eggs 3/4 cup mirin 1/4 cup dark soy sauce 1/4 cup regular soy sauce
recipes.instructions:
1. Boil salted water, bring heat down to medium so rolling boils slows
2. Add 6 eggs to water and cover for 6 minutes (better if eggs are room temp, 5.5 mins)
3. Pull eggs immediately and put in cold water to cool down
4. Peel and add to marinade for at least 2 hours, overnight

recipes.name: Austin Diner Style Queso
recipes.instructions:
1. Melt butter, add onion and jalapenos, cook until softened. Add chreen chiles and garlic, cook 30 seconds
2. Whisk milk, 1 cup water, & cornstarch in a bowl until combined. Add to mixture in pan, bring to simmer over medium low heat. Cook until mixture thickens 5-7 minutes
3. Add cheese, reduce heat to low and cook until melted. Add cumin, salt, and cayenne

recipes.name: Bacon Egg Bites (Starbucks)
ingredients: 1-1/4 cup Grated/Shredded Cheddar (can mix with Gruyere or Smoked Gouda)
4-6 pieces of Bacon (cooked and diced up)
Salt, Pepper, Hot Sauce, garlic powder
recipes.instructions:
1. Cook bacon and cut into bits
2. Bring kettle full of water to boil
3. Preheat oven to 350
4. Mix all ingredients except Bacon in blender
5. Place molds in glass casserole dish, Pour mixture into molds, fill casserole dish with boiling water
6. Bake 25-30 mins

recipes.name: Baked Ham with Brown Sugar Glaze
recipes.comments: We haven't done a standard ham in a long time and this would be a good green egg thing

recipes.name: Baked Parmesan Chicken
ingredients: 5 t italian seasoned bread crumbs (enough to cover the chicken)
Salt & Lemon Pepper for seasoning on the plate
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F
2. In a bowl, combine the mayo, garlic powder, and parmesan cheese
3. Lay the chicken on a baking sheet and spread the mayonnaise across the chicken breasts evenly
4. Bake for 15-20 minutes, remove from the oven and sprinkle the bread crumbs on the chicken
5. Return to the oven and bake an additional 20 minutes until the juices become clear
6. Serve with brocolli or veggies

recipes.name: BBQ Oven Baked Chicken
recipes.instructions:
1. Salt chicken thighs a few hours before cooking
2. Preheat oven to 400
3. Line baking sheet with foil, paper towel dry thighs, Olive oil both sides of chicken and rub all seasonings on chicken (except BBQ sauce)
4. Place chicken on baking sheet, skin side up, and bake for 35-45 minutes
5. Baste top of chicken and broil for 3-5 minutes

recipes.name: Beef Medallions with Red Wine Pan Sauce
ingredients: 4 (5 to 6 oz) beef tenderloin medallions, about 1-1/2 inch thick (tie strings tightly around each fillet before slicing to make them consistent shape)
Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 T minced fresh thyme, plus 3 sprigs
recipes.instructions:
Beef:
1. Allow medallions to sit at room temperature for 30 mins before cooking
2. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add oil
3. While the skillet is heating, season the medallions generously with salt, pepper, and minced thyme
4. When oil is shimmering and just begins to smoke, carefully place the fullets into the skillet and sear on all sides, turning about 3 minutes
5. Cook until internal temperature reaches 125 to 130 for medium rare (considering that the steak will increase in temperature by almost 10 degrees after it is removed from the heat). Keep the juices in the skillet
Sauce:
1. Add 2 T of butter to the skillet set to medium heat
2. When the butter is melted and foam subsides, add shallots and cook until browned, about 3 minutes
3. If shallots become dry during cooking, add water as needed, 1 T at a time
4. Using a wooden spoon, stir in the wine and broth, using the spoon to scrape the pan
5. Add the thyme sprigs and increase the heat to medium-high, bring to a boil
6. Once boiling, lower the heat and simmer until the sauce thickens, about 8 minutes
7. Remove from the heat, remove the thyme sprigs, and whisk in the remaining 1 T butter, taste and adjust with salt and pepper
recipes.comments: Sur La Table cooking class recipe

recipes.name: Beef Tamale Pie
recipes.instructions: From Mom

recipes.name: Beef Wellington
recipes.comments: Definitely use mustard, proscuitto, add garlic to the duxelle and put in blender, get the right pastry dough. Check out Gordon Ramsey's recipe

recipes.name: Beer butt chicken
ingredients: 4 T Poultry Seasoning (2 t sage, 1-1/2 t thyme, 1 t marjoram, 3/4 t rosemary, 1/2 t nutmeg, 1/2 black pepper)
Barbecue sauce (something decently think - bone suckin, sweet baby ray's, etc.)
recipes.instructions:
1. Take a big gulp of beer (little more than a quarter)
2. Pour the rest of the beer into a mixing bowl
3. Cut the top off of the beer can as high up as possible
4. Mix in 2 T of the poultry seasoning, garlic salt, and pepper with the beer. Whisk gently to avoid bubbles
5. Heat the grill to 275F covered indirect heat
6. Massage the chicken with olive oil
7. Pour half the contents of the bowl back into the beer can until it's a little over half full. Then top off to 1 inch from the top with the barbecud sauce
8. Jam the can up the chicken's ass
9. Coat chicken with the rest of the poultry seasoning
10. Cover grill and cook for 90-120 mins, to 175F on the meat thermometer

recipes.name: Beet and Horseradish Cured Salmon
recipes.comments: Cured salmon.

recipes.name: Biscuits and Sausage Gravy
ingredients: 1 lb. breakfast sausage, hot or mild
3 to 4 cups whole milk, more to taste (1% or 2% works)
2 t freshly ground black pepper, more to taste
Biscuits, warmed, for serving (from a package - can be homemade separately)
recipes.instructions:
1. With your finger, tear small pieces of sausage and add them in a single layer to a large heavy skillet. Can also just start cooking the sausage and split it up as it cooks
2. Brown the sausage over medium-high heat until no longer pink
3. Reduce the heat to medium-low. Sprinkle on half the flour and stir so that the sausage soaks it all up, then add more little by little
4. Stir it around and cook it for another minute or so, then pour in the milk, stirring constantly
5. Cook the gravy, stirring frequently, until it thickens. (This may take a good 10 to 12 minutes.)
6. Sprinkle in the seasoned salt and pepper and continue cooking until very thick and luscious. If it gets too thick too soon, just splash in another 1/2 cup of milk or more if needed. Taste and adjust the seasoning

recipes.name: BLT Salad with warm dressing
ingredients: 1 head romaine lettuce, chopped into bite sized pieces
1 head butter lettuce, chopped into bite sized pieces
1 pint grape or cherry tomatoes, halved
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat olive oil in microwave for 15-20 seconds (or use warm bacon grease
2. Whisk in Vinegar, Honey, Mustard, S&P
3. Pour over Lettuce, Tomato, Bacon, & Avocado
recipes.comments: Complete Diet Book

recipes.name: Bordelaise
recipes.instructions:
Cook down the shallot with half of the butter
Add the red wine and let it reduce by half
Add the beef stock and let it reduce by half
If cooking with a steak, add streak drippings to the sauce at the end
If too thick, add some flour
Add Garlic when wine is added if looking for more garlic flavor
Emulsion blend to smooth out sauce and break down shallots
Add 2nd half of butter at the end

recipes.name: Boursin Mashed Potatoes
ingredients: 5 pounds Yukon gold potatoes peeled and cut into chunks
1 stick butter melted + 2 tablespoons cut into pieces
1 5.2-ounce package Boursin, cut into large pieces (garlic & fine herbs)
recipes.instructions:
1. Put potatoes into large saucepan and add enough water to cover, plus about 1 inch. Salt the water. Cook over medium-low heat until fork tender, about 15-20 minutes
2. In a separate saucepan, melt butter, add half and half. Heat until simmering
3. Drain potatoes and pour potatoes back into saucepan used to cook them. Use a hand mixer to blend potatoes until smooth
4. Add the melted butter/half and half mixture and boursin pieces to potatoes. Mix until until creamy.
5. Top with remaining 2 tablespoons of butter and a sprinkle of salt and pepper

recipes.name: Broccoli Salad
recipes.instructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a bowl
2. Whisk together all dressing ingredients, pour over and mix into salad
3. Let sit in fridge for at least an hour

recipes.name: Brown butter Garlic Parmesan Mashed Potatoes
Brown Butter Scallops with Parmesan Risotto and Sauteed Spinach
Browned Butter Green Beans
recipes.comments: Look for St. Elmo's Recipe

recipes.name: Brussels Sprouts Salad (with Pomegranate & Parmesan)
recipes.comments: This would be a nice refreshing salad and easy

recipes.name: Buffalo Chicken Dip
ingredients: 1 lb. chicken cooked and shredded (can be canned breasts or cooked breasts and shred yourself)
8 oz. shredded cheddar cheese (more or less)
Frito corn chip, scoops. Club Crackers. Tostitos work too.
recipes.instructions:
1. Beat cream cheese, ranch dressing, and red hot sauce
2. Fold in shredded chicken
3. Spread mixture into pie plate
4. Bake at 350F for 15 minutes
5. Add cheddar cheese to top after first 15 minutes in oven
6. Bake an additional 10 to 15 minutes

recipes.name: Bulgogi Pork Tenderloin
ingredients: Find a recipe, sear pork, use same pan for sauce, oven pork, finish with sauce. Serve with carrots and lime rice

recipes.name: Butter Chicken
recipes.comments: From Fiona CTO

recipes.name: Buttermilk Alfredo Chicken Spinach Pasta
recipes.instructions: From Mom

recipes.name: Buttermilk Boursin Mashed Potatoes
recipes.comments: Huge fan of these. Must bake them.

recipes.name: Cauliflower and Brussels
ingredients: 1 1/2 lbs brussels sprouts trimmed and cut in half
Garlic powder, Onion powder, herbs and spices
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees
2. Boil water and blanch brussels sprouts for 2 minutes to soften (optional step). Rinse and dry before next step
3. Coat brussel sprouts and cauliflower with olive oil and all seasonings
4. Bake for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally or until vegetables are tender
recipes.comments: Truffle oil is clutch. Don't over blanch the brussels sprouts or they will be way too soft.

recipes.name: Cheesy Sausage Egg Casserole
recipes.comments: Add diced red bell pepper

recipes.name: Chef Show Lasagna
ingredients: Olive Oil, Salt, Pepper, Chili Flakes
recipes.instructions:
1. Boil and cook Lasagna Sheets, Al dente, don't rinse
2. Slice Meatballs into chunks, Slice Buffalo Mozzarella into chunks (same size), Break up fresh Basil, Add Sauce to Ricotta in a bowl
3. Oil deep baking sheet, sauce on the bottom, Sheets
4. Mozzarella chunks, Meatball chunks, shredded mozzarella, ricotta chunks, grated parmigiana reggiano, fresh oregano, sauce, ricotta sauce, chili flakes, fennel pollen, sheets
5. Repeat until top layer, cover in sauce, shredded mozzarella, grated parmigiana.
6. Cover with foil and bake at 350 for 45
7. Uncover to finish
8. Let rest
9. Serve with parmigiana chunks and fresh pepper on top
recipes.comments: Makes 2 large pans of Lasagna

recipes.name: Chef Show Meatballs
recipes.instructions:
1. Cook Mushroom Stock (1lb white buttom mushrooms, quartered; 2-3 carrots, diced; 1 celery stalk, diced; 3-4 cloves of garlic; 8 cups water; 2-3 pinches of salt)
2. Confit Garlic in Olive Oil, simmering
3. 1/2 pork, 1/2 beef (70/30) mixed with Chopoped Parsley, Roasted Garlic, Panko Bread Crumbs, Grated Parmesan Cheese, Salt/Pepper, Chili Flakes, Eggs, Olive Oil, Fennel Pollen, Pureed White Onions (w/ a little water)
4. Oiled baking sheet, oil on top of meatballs, 350 oven (slightly under cooked for Lasagna) about 30 mins
recipes.comments: Makes 2 large sheet pans of meatballs

recipes.name: Chef Show Sauce
recipes.instructions:
1. Confit Garlic, Mushroom Stock, Whole Tomatoes, Cook down
2. Add a few meatballs, Salt, Cook down
3. Puree sauce, Cook down
recipes.comments: Makes 1 large pot of sauce in Dutch oven

recipes.name: Chicken Breast Stuffed with Feta and Oregano
recipes.instructions:
1. Make stuffing by combining feta and oregano in a bowl.
2. Create pocket in the thick end of the breast, without going through the other side. Stuff cheese evenly into the pockets. Season generously with salt and pepper on both sides
3. Heat pan at medium low before adding oil, so that the oil heats right away but does not start smoking.
4. Turn heat up to medium high and sear chicken for 6 - 7 minutes per side. Do not stir or touch until nicely browned to ensure they don't stick to the pan. Turn heat down to medium heat, cover and cook for an additional 5 - 8 minutes until chicken is cooked throughout.
5. Remove chicken from pan. Add chicken stock to pan and loosen brown bits from pan to dissolve into liquid. Add juice of 1/2 a lemon to pan and simmer for a minute or two. Turn heat to low or off and swirl butter into sauce until dissolved.
Serve chicken sliced to show off stuffing, and topped with sauce.
recipes.comments: Amazing. Add bacon strips to the inside of the stuffing for more fat and flavor. Cook the bacon and let it cool first. Also, don't skimp on the sauce. It's dank.

recipes.name: Chicken Fajitas
ingredients: 1 t pure chile powder 1 t kosher salt 1/2 t ground cumin 1/2 t onion powder 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder 1 T cornstarch 1/4 cup water 3 T extra-virgin olive oil 1 whole skinless, boneless chicken breast (about 1 pound), cut into 1/2-inch strips 1 green bell pepper-cored, seeded and cut into thin strips 1 medium onion, thinly sliced 2 T fresh lime juice, plus lime wedges for serving 8 flour tortillas, warmed in the microwave Shredded lettuce, shredded cheddar cheese, salsa and sour cream, for serving
recipes.instructions:
1. In a resealable plastic bag, combine the chile powder with the salt, cumin, onion powder, garlic powder, cornstarch, water and 2 T of the oil. Add the chicken, bell pepper and onion, seal and knead gently to coat. Refrigerate for 15 minutes
2. Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil in a large nonstick skillet until shimmering. Empty the contents of the bag into the skillet and cook over high heat, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are crisp-tender and the chicken is cooked through, about 6 minutes. Remove from the heat and stir in the lime juice (Optional)
3. Transfer the chicken and vegetables to a large bowl and serve with the warmed tortillas, lettuce, cheese, salsa, sour cream and lime wedges

recipes.name: Chicken Gyro
recipes.instructions:
1. Cook up the rotisserie chicken (shredded) in a pan with the red wine vingar, herbs, and Olive Oil
2. Assemble the Remaining ingredients inside the Lightly toasted Pita Bread

recipes.name: Chicken paprikas
ingredients: 4 lbs. of Chicken Thighs (8 pieces - equivalent of a full chicken)
recipes.instructions:
1. In a stewpot sauté onions in shortening until they are glossy, not browned
2. Stir in salt, paprika, and black pepper
3. Add chicken and fry until all pieces are coated with the mixture. Medium high heat
4. Lower heat to Medium Low, add the warm water to avoid cooling the pot or chicken down, cover pot and simmer for 1 hour until chicken is tender (Leave top slightly tilted about halfway through to allow juices to reduce slightly)
5. Blend a few T of the sauce with sour cream and corn starch together in a bowl until all of the lumps are gone
6. Add sour cream mixture to the pot until the sauce thickens. Salt and pepper to taste
7. Serve over with Nokedli and ladle the sauce over the top
recipes.comments: This recipe needs to be tweaked with Grandma.

recipes.name: Chicken Piccata
recipes.instructions:
1. Place chicken between 2 sheets of plastic wrap and pound until it's 1/4 inch thick
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Mix 1 T butter & 1-1/2 T flour in a bowl until smooth
4. Place additional flour on a plate and coat the chicken in flour
5. Add 1 T oil to a pan and bring to a medium high cooking temperature. Cook 2 or 3 breasts at a time until golden brown (~3 minutes/side)
6. Transfer chicken to a platter, tent with foil while cooking others
7. In the same pan, bring wine, lemon juice, and broth to a boilover medium-high heat. Whisk in the butter/four mixture and boil until sauce thickens (~2 minutes)
8. Stir in the capers, parsley, and remaining 2 T butter, let cook for 1-2 minutes and remove from heat
9. Pour over chicken and serve over pasta

recipes.name: Chicken Salad Croissant Sandwich
ingredients: There was a recipe with grapes, nuts, celery, and onion that was unbelievable. Need to find and reproduce this,

recipes.name: Chicken Sausage, Sweet Potato, & Kale Soup with Herb Butter Toast Points (HelloFresh)
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425
2. Pull out 2T Butter and allow to get to room temp, add italian seasonings to butter
3. Heat olive oil over medium high, add onion 4-5 minutes, add sausage 5-7 minutes until browned and cooked through
4. Add sweet potato, chicken stock, italian seasoning, salt and pepper. Cover and bring to boil, reduce heat to medium and simmer for 7-10 minutes
5. Uncover pot, stir in kale, simmer until kale is wilted and sweet potato is tender 5-7 minutes, season with salt and pepper as needed
6. Mix softened butter with italian seasoning and salt, spread over bread halves, toast on top rack until golden 3-5 mins, halve points diagonally so they are pointed
7. Top soup with chili flakes and parmesan, served with toast points
recipes.comments: 2 servings, decently small

recipes.name: Chicken, Broccoli, and Rice Casserole
recipes.instructions: Haven't made

recipes.name: Chinese Fried Rice
ingredients: 8 oz. cooked lean boneless pork or 8 oz. chicken, chopped (depending if you want chicken/pork fried rice, works without it)
4 cups COLD cooked white rice, grains separated (1.5 water to 1 rice, rinse rice first)
recipes.instructions:
This feeds
4.
1. Cook the rice and cool it down in the fridge for at least an hour
2. Heat 1 T oil in wok; add chopped onions and stir fry until onions turn brown, remove from wok and place in a bowl
3. Allow the wok to cool slightly, mix the 3 drops of soy sauce and sesame oil to the beaten egg
4. Add 1/2 T oil to the wok and heat over medium heat, add the egg mixture and swirl it to ensure it covers the whole pan. Cook it until it puffs, flip the egg and cook the other side until egg is cooked. Remove from the wok, and slice the egg into small pieces
5. Heat 1 T oil in the wok over medium-high heat, add the meat, carrots, peas, and cooked onion. Cook for 2 minutes
6. Add the rice, green onions, and bean sprouts and stir-fry for 3 minutes
7. Add 2 T of soy sauce and the chopped egg and stir-fry for another minute
recipes.comments: Really good. Super important to cool the rice. Important to keep the pan hot. Also, the egg is best if cooked as a whole piece and slice after cooked. I made this without bean sprouts, peas, or meat and it still turned out good.

recipes.name: Christmas Pesto Lasagna
recipes.instructions: Forgot to add the parmesan and cream to the bolognese but it was still amazing. Use Char Sui pork belly instead of Pancetta
recipes.comments: Amazing

recipes.name: Collared greens
ingredients: 1 T olive oil 5 slices bacon, sliced into small pieces 1 large onion, chopped 4 cloves garlic, minced 1 t salt 1 t pepper 3 cups chicken broth 1 pinch red pepper flakes 1 lb. fresh collard greens, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add bacon, and cook until crisp.
3. Add onion, and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Add garlic, and cook until just fragrant.
5. Add collard greens, and fry until they start to wilt.
6. Pour in chicken broth, and season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes, or until greens are tender.
recipes.comments: This is great with a BBQ'd pork or chicken meal.

recipes.name: Creamed Spinach
ingredients: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipes.instructions:
1. In a medium saute pan over medium-high heat, melt butter and then add the olive oil
2. Mix in the onions and garlic; cook for 2 minutes until soft
3. Add the chopped spinach and warm through
4. Add the salt, pepper, nutmeg and the heavy cream. Mix well
5. Cook until liquid reduces by half, roughly 3 to 4 minutes

recipes.name: Crispy Oven Baked Chicken Thighs
recipes.instructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 425F
2. Mix all ingredients except Salt & Pepper in a small bowl
3. Salt & Pepper the chicken, then brush each side with the mixture
4. Bake skin side up for 35 minutes (turning off the oven after 28 mins)

recipes.name: Croissant and Chocolate Bread Pudding
ingredients: Unsalted butter for the baking dish
4 ounces bittersweet chocolate, cut into chunks
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat oven to 375° F. Butter an 8-inch square or other shallow 2-quart baking dish.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the egg yolks, milk, cream, sugar, vanilla, salt, and nutmeg.
3. Add the croissants and chocolate and mix to combine.
4. Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish and bake until set and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, 30 to 40 minutes. Serve warm or at room temperature.
recipes.comments: Amazing when it first comes out of the oven but also pretty good when it is at room temp too.

recipes.name: Deep Dish Garlic Bread Lasagna Pie
Duck Prosciutto
recipes.comments: Cured duck.

recipes.name: Edible Cookies
recipes.instructions:
Decarboxylation:
1. Preheat the oven to 240 degrees F
2. Grind the weed and spread on a baking sheet (some say just breaking it up is good enough...)
3. Place in the oven and monitor for 30-40 minutes, looking for golden brown color (careful not to overcook)
4. Take out and allow to cool
Infusion:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring a quart of water to a boil
2. Once boiling, add in your sticks of butter and allow it to melt completely
3. Add the weed and reduce to a simmer. Weed should always be floating 1.5-2 inches from the bottom
4. Butter should cook at a low heat for 3 hours until the mixture becomes thick at the top
5. Pour through a cheese cloth into a mixing bowl and squeeze out as much of the butter as possible
6. Cool the butter
Cookies:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F
2. Mix the sugars, butter, vanilla, and egg in a large bowl
3. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt
4. Stir in the nuts and chocolate chips
5. Drop the dough about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheet
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until light brown
7. Careful, they good

recipes.name: Everything Salmon Fillets & Cream Cheese Potatotes
Fish Tacos
ingredients: 1 lb lean white fish fillets (tilapia , halibut, mahi mahi, snapper, cod)
1-1/2 t chili powder, 1 t ground cumin, 1/2 t paprika, 1/4 t cayenne
1/2 t garlic powder, 1/2 t cumin, 1/4 t salt, 1 t Sriracha
Shredded cabbage (small bag cabbage, 1/2 cup apple cider vinegar, 1/4 cup water, 1/2 t Salt, 1/2 t Brown Sugar, 1t Dried Oregano, 1t Red Pepper Flakes)
Pico de gallo (salsa), Cotija cheese (cheddar), Lime wedges, Sriracha, 8 1/2 corn 1/2 flour tortillas
recipes.instructions:
1. Season the fish with S&P, whisk the rest of the marinade ingredients in a bowl, marinade fix filets for 20-30 minutes
2. Mix together Shredded cabbage mixture in a bowl, let sit for an hour
3. Mix together Fish Taco Sauce (crema) ingredients in a bowl
4. Grill the fish over high flame for 4-5 minutes per side until the fish gets flaky, cover with foil and let finish cooking on a plate
5. Assemble tacos over lightly toasted tortillas

recipes.name: French Onion Soup
ingredients: 3 large white onions, thinly sliced into half moons
recipes.instructions:
1. In a large pot over medium-high heat, melt butter
2. Add onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until deeply golden, 25 minutes
3. Add flour, stir to combine, season with salt and pepper, then add white wine and let simmer until evaporated, 3 minutes
4. Add chicken, beef stocks and thyme and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer 30-45 minutes
5. Season with salt and pepper and remove thyme (if not dried)
6. Preheat broiler to high. Place bowls on a baking dish to ease pulling out of oven. Fill bowl 3/4 with soup, place 2-3 baguette slices on top of bowl and cover with cheese
7. Place under broiler until cheese is bubbling and golden brown, 7-10 minutes
8. Place bowls on top of small plates to ease carrying while the bowls cool down
recipes.comments: https://www.delish.com/cooking/recipe-ideas/a44297/easy-french-onion-soup-recipe/

recipes.name: Frites with Truffle Mayonnaise
ingredients: 4 large (about 2 lbs.) russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/4 x 1/4 x 3-inch matchsticks
2 quarts vegetable, or peanut oil, for frying
1 T fresh lemon juice, plus more if needed
Black truffle salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipes.instructions:
Fries:
1. Preheat oven to 200 degrees (optional to keep fries warm)
2. Soak cut potatoes in cold water for 30 minutes (very important that the water is cold)
3. Preheat a deep fryer or dutch oven over medium heat, add oil. Heat oil to 330F
4. Drain potatoes and dry very thoroughly with paper towels
5. Working in batches, blanch potatoes in hot oil until nearly cooked through but not browned, 5 to 6 minutes (keep oil temp close to 330F by adjusting heat)
6. Remove from oil and place on a cooling rack to avoid letting them sit in the oil
7. Increase the heat of the oil to 375F
8. Working in batches, fry the blanched potatoes until crispy and golden brown, about 3 to 5 minutes
9.Remove from oil to a wire rack again and salt immediately
10. Place fries in oven to keep warm
Mayonnaise:
1. In a mixing bowl, add egg yolk, garlic, and water (use a blender for thicker mayo)
2. In a separate bowl, stir the olive oil and vegetable oil together
3. While whisking the egg mixture, slowly add oil in drops to form an emulsion
4. Continue whisking and slowly drizzling in the oil to form a thick sauce
5. Taste and adjust with lemon juice, black truffle salt and pepper
6. Store refrigerated
recipes.comments: Sur La Table cooking class recipe

recipes.name: Grandpa's Cream of Leek Soup
recipes.instructions:
1. Melt butter, add diced vegetables except potato. Cook until tender but not browned
2. Add chicken stock and diced potato. Liquid should cover vegetables. Bring to a boil, simmer for 10-15 minutes or until potato is tender
3. Combine flour and cream, add to soup and bring to a simmer
4. Garnish with croutons

recipes.name: Grilled Buffalo Wings
recipes.instructions:
1. Season wings on both sides at least an hour before cooking and refrigerate
2. Put wings on a hot grill
3. Melt butter and mix in hot sauce & optionally add apple cider vinegar and honey
4. Pour over wings & serve with Blue Cheese Dressing
recipes.comments: Big drumsticks are great with this recipe

recipes.name: Hashbrown Casserole
recipes.instructions: Caramelize the onions
recipes.comments: Christmas

recipes.name: Healthy Hashbrown Casserole
recipes.instructions:
1. Spray a 9x13 inch baking dish with cooking spray or with butter, pre-heat oven to 350 degrees F
2. Add the veggies and half of the hashbrowns to the baking dish
3. Whisk the eggs, salt, mustard, and greek yogurt. Add to the baking dish and combine with the hashbrowns/veggies
4. Add 1-1/2 cups of cheese (keep the rest for the top), coat everything with the egg mixture
5. Stir in the remaining hashbrowns and top with the cheddar cheese
6. Bake for 50 mins

recipes.name: Herb & Mustard Sirloin with Baked Potatoes
Herb Roasted Lobster Tails
ingredients: Optional: Fresh Parsley, Fresh Chives, Lemon Juice, Fresh Oregano
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425
2. Chop all herbs, melt butter, squeeze lemon, & mix together
3. Cut the top of the lobster shell, pull the lobster from the shell (leaving the end closest to the tail connected) and lay it on top of the shell
4. Brush with butter and bake for 8 to 10 minutes

recipes.name: Home-Cured Bacon
recipes.comments: Homemade cured bacon...gotta try it.

recipes.name: Homemade Chili Sauce
ingredients: 2 tablespoons vinegar (I used white vinegar; cider vinegar would be good, too)
1/2 teaspoon chili powder (I used ancho chili powder; regular would be fine)
Dash each of cloves and allspice (my "dash" equals about half of my 1/8 measuring spoon)

recipes.name: Homemade Cocktail Sauce
ingredients: 1/2 of a lemon, juiced, about 2 tablespoons
3 tablespoons prepared horseradish (not horseradish cream), or less to taste

4-5 tablespoons (go easy on yourself-taste test it before serving) ground horseradish (look for it in the refrigerated section of your grocery store-alternatively, you can do the shredded fresh horseradish root/cider vinegar marinade)****Add more or less if you desire.
recipes.comments: Try with fresh grated horseradish

recipes.name: Homemade Guacamole
recipes.instructions: 1. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl

recipes.name: Homemade Pasta Sauce
ingredients: 2 garlic cloves (though I ALWAYS use much much more). Peeled and smashed for half and diced for the remainder
1 (28 oz.) can of whole San Marzano tomatoes, crushed by hand (I bought two of the larger cans)
1 full red onion, peeled and halved
recipes.instructions:
1. In a deep saucepan heat 2 T of olive oil over medium heat, add the garlic until it sweats and smells good
2. Add the tomatoes and all of the juice. Squeezing each tomato and then add the tomato paste. Add the red onion, carrot, basil, parmesan, bay leaf, and salt
3. Reduce the heat to low and simmer, stirring often with a wooden sppon (important that it's wooden and not metal). Cook for anywhere betwen 25 mins and an hour
4. Stir in the rest of the olive oil and simmer for 5 more mins
5. Allow the sauce to cool to room temperature and remove the onion, carrot, parmesan rinds, basil, and bay leaf
6. Pass the sauce through a blender to puree
7. Bring to a heavy simmer for another 15-20 mins to allow all of the flavors to integrate (this can be done after refrigerating or freezing the next time you want to use it)
recipes.comments: Parmesan rinds are clutch. More time means more flavor in most scenarios.

recipes.name: Homemade Steak Sauce
ingredients: Cooked steak, Wine, Onions, Garlic, Worcestershire, Butter, salt, pepper
recipes.instructions: Consult with Jordan's dad

recipes.name: Honey Balsamic Glazed Bone-in Pork Chops
ingredients: 4 bone-in pork loin chops (1 inch thick and 10 ounces each)
1 t minced fresh rosemary or 1/4 t dried rosemary, crushed
recipes.instructions:
1. Seaon pork chops with pepper flakes, salt, pepper, and any other good seasoning that will make a nice crust.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add pork; cook for 5-7 minutes on each side or until meat reaches desired temperature (145° for medium-rare; 160° for medium). Remove and keep warm.
3. In the same skillet, whisk the vinegar, honey, green onions, garlic, rosemary, salt and pepper; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, for 6-8 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from the heat; whisk in butter until melted.
recipes.comments: Pour the pork chop juice into the sauce for more flavorful sauce. Use a cast iron pan. White balsamic vinegar is great.

recipes.name: Honey Bourbon Mustard Slow cooked Bone In Ham
ingredients: 1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipes.instructions:
Heat glaze ingredients in a pan until boiling, pour over ham in an instant pot
Set instant pot to slow cook for 6.5+ hours
Pull ham out and set to saute, let glaze boil for 10 minutes

recipes.name: Hungarian Gulyas
ingredients: 2 lbs. Pork Butt diced into 1" cubes (keep the fat)
recipes.instructions:
1. Cube the pork butt and salt generously
2. Chop the onion, add the shortening to a dutch oven until it melts over medium heat, then add Onion
3. Cook onion until it is clear & glossy, then add the paprika to coat the onion
4. Add the salted meat and cook on medium-high heat until brown on the outside
5. Preheat 1 quart of water so it doesn't cool down the pot, then add to the dutch oven and cover. Simmer over medium-low heat for 45 minutes
6. Add carrots and celery to the mixture, cover and simmer for 15 minutes. Keep in mind it will take about 10 minutes to get this back to a simmer since the heat is still medium-low
7. Preheat another quart of water. Add potatotes to the mixure, and add water appropriately to ensure everything is still covered. Simmer for another 30 minutes (until the potatoes are soft)
8. Add salt as needed
recipes.comments:
Parsley added in somewhere here, forgot to do it the first time.
Salt the pork generously, then as it cooks you can add more salt and more paprika to the mixture to get the right flavor and color.

recipes.name: Instant Pot Asian-Style Short Ribs
ingredients: 1 T chili garlic sauce (same brand as sriracha)
1/4 cup thinly sliced green onions, white and light green (cut more for garnish - definitely necessary
2/3 cup low-sodium soy sauce (important to be low sodium or it's overwhelming)
3 lb. flanken-cut beef short ribs, about 1/2 inch thick each (this should look like a thin slice across the bones such that each strip will have a few bones)
recipes.instructions:
1. In the instant pot, combine the sesame oil, garlic, ginger, chili garlic sauce, green onions, honey, soy sauce, and water
2. Add the beef to the pot and make sure it's covered in the sauce
3. Set the instant pot to pressure cook at high pressure for 20 minutes
4. Instant release the pressure at time
5. Remove the ribs and set aside covered with foil
6. Strain off some of the fat
7. Set the instant pot to saute and simmer the sauce uncovered until it is reduced to about a cup (it should start to thicken up and bubble differently in the pot)
8. Pour the sauce into a bowl and add the hoisin to it
9. Pour the sauce over the meat and serve all of it over white rice

recipes.name: Instant Pot Mac & Cheese
recipes.instructions: I made this one w half goat cheddar & half sharp cheddar

recipes.name: Instant Pot Salmon with Garlic Potatoes & Greens
Instant Pot White Rice
recipes.instructions:
1. Rinse the rice in a colander until the liquid becomes clear
2. Soak the rice in water for up to 30 minutes before cooking
3. Strain the rice and add to the instant pot
4. Add the water (1:1 ratio water:rice)
5. Set the instant pot to pressure cook on high pressure for 4 minutes with the keep warm setting on
6. Once the rice has been sitting for 10 minutes, release the pressure and serve

recipes.name: Italian Chopped Salad

recipes.name: Kan's Sausage Rigatoni

recipes.name: Keylime Pie
ingredients: 4 Eggs (3 egg yolks and 4 egg whites)
½ teaspoon Corn Starch (cream of tartar)
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 F
2. Mix Melted butter and graham cracker crumbs, press into 9" pie pan to form the crust
3. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the outside is dark brown (15-20 minutes)
4. Separate the 4 eggs into two separate bowls, keeping 3 egg yolks and 4 egg whites
5. Whisk the condensed milk, the key-lime juice, the heavy whipping cream, and the egg yolks to make the filling, as an option add the 2 teaspoons of zested key-lime, set aside
6. Mix the white sugar, pinch of salt, and corn starch (cream de tarter) by hand in a separate bowl, this will be used to make the meringue, set aside
7. Wait for the pie crust to finish baking, add the filling (from step 5) to the pie crust, reduce heat to 350 F, bake 40-50 minutes or until the center of the filling cracks
8. While baking: Using a hand mixer, beat the egg whites until fluffy or about 90 seconds
9. Slowly beat the meringue mixture (from step 6) into the egg whites to make the meringue, beat until whipped cream like consistency or about 2 minutes
10. Spoon the meringue on top of hot pie, torch the top to color preference (or broil on high for a few minutes
11. Eat it room temp over Vanilla Bean Ice Cream. Dank. Refrigerate it and eat it cold. Dank. Eat it all.
12. Bubba's florida recipe

recipes.name: Kyle's Bolognese
ingredients: Can of fresh san marzanno tomatoes (optional if enough sauce from Rao's)
Chicken Stock (optional if liquid is right)
salt, pepper, red pepper flakes, sugar (if no balsamic glaze)

recipes.name: Kyle's or Meat Church Habenero Peach Smoked Ribs (Traeger)
ingredients: Cow Cover or similar seasoning for ribs (salt, pepper, garlic, onion, chili powder, paprika)
Habanero wrap: Brown Sugar, Butter (4-5 pats/rack), Habanero Sauce
Habanero Glaze: 3 parts BBQ sauce, 1 part Honey, 2 parts Peach Pepper Jelly, Dashes of Habanero hot sauce to taste
recipes.instructions:
5.5 hours
1. Peel membrane, filet off extra fat, mustard binder, season & pat. Do this no more than 1 hour before cook. Let sit at room temp ~30 mins until meat sweats (1 hour). For Kyle's recipe, cut onion into large slices and place ribs on top, wrap with foil before cook
2. Set Traeger to 275F, for Habanero ribs, cook for ~2.5 hours before the ribs turn too dark). For wrapped ribs, this will be longer, waiting for the juices to flow out and dissipate mostly, ribs should become looser and easier to pull apart
3. For Habanero ribs: pull off, put pats of butter on top, sprinkle sugar, squirt of hot sauce, and wrap. Put back on smoker for another 1.5 to 2 hours or until the bones are sticking out about 1/4". Make the glaze in a sauce pot by mixing everything together, add Bourbon if interested? Unwrap the ribs, leaving the foil on the bottom and glaze, leave open in smoker another 15-20 mins

recipes.name: Kyle's Smoked Brisket (Traeger)
recipes.instructions:
21 hours
1. Trim Brisket fat (45 mins)
2. Season with Salt and Pepper, let sit 1 hour at room temp
3. Set Traeger to 200F, super smoke mode, put Brisket on for 12 hours, cheack and spray with vinegar occasionally (goal temperature is 175F)
4. Up temp to 225F if goal temperature is not met in 12 hrs
5. Pull meat @175F internal temp, smear beef tallow all over and wrap with butcher paper
6. Up temp to 250F, put Brisket on until internal temp is 203F (4 hours)
7. Pull and let rest at least 1 hour
8. Slice and prep (15 mins)

recipes.name: Kyle's Smoked Pork Butt/Pulled Pork (Traeger)
ingredients: Salt, Pepper, Chili Powder, Garlic Powder, Paprika
recipes.instructions:
11.5 hours
1. Trim, Prep & Season (30 mins)
2. Rest for 1 hour at room temp
3. Set Traeger to 225 on super smoke mode, put Pork on until internal temp is 165F, spraying with vinegar occasionally to form crust (6 hours)
4. Pull meat @165F, wrap with butcher paper and put back on until internal temp hits 195F (3 hours)
5. Pull and let rest at least 30 mins
6. Pull, slice and prep (15 mins)

recipes.name: Lemon Ricotta Pancakes
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat griddle to moderately-high heat
2. In a mixing bowl whisk together flour, granulated sugar, baking powder, baking soda and salt for 20 seconds
3. Make a well in center of flour mixture and set aside
4. In a separate large mixing bowl, whisk together milk, ricotta, eggs and vanilla until well blended
5. Add butter, lemon zest and lemon juice to milk mixture and blend until combined (it will curdle, that's fine)
6. Immediately pour milk mixture into flour mixture and whisk just to combined (batter should be slightly lumpy)
7. Pour 1/3 cup batter onto buttered griddle or skillet and cook until bubbles begin to appear on surface and bottom is golden brown, then flip and cook opposite side until golden brown
8. Serve warm with Maldon Sea Salt whipped butter and drizzle with maple syrup

recipes.name: Les Halles Vichyssoise
ingredients: 8 leeks, white part only, cleaned and thinly sliced
2 medium potatoes, cut into small cubes
recipes.instructions:
1. In a large pot, melt butter over medium-low heat. Once butter is melted, add the leeks and sweat for 5 minutes, making sure they do not take on any color
2. Add potatoes and cook for a minute or two, stirring a few times
3. Stir in the chicken broth and bring to a boil
4. Reduce heat to a simmer. Cook on low heat, gently simmering for 35 minutes, or until the leeks and potatoes are very soft. Allow to cool for a few minutes
5. Slowly, and in SMALL batches, puree the soup at a high speed in the blender
6. Return soup to the cooking pot and whisk in cream and nutmeg. Season with salt and pepper. Return to a boil, reduce to simmer and cook 5 minutes
7. Transfer soup to the mixing bowl an chill over the ice bath, stirring occasionally. When soup is at Room temperature, and only at room temperature, cover in plastic wrap and put into the refrigerator to cool
8. Check seasoning, sprinkle with chives and serve in chilled bowls. (Add a dollop of truffle creme fraiche)
recipes.comments: - MAKE SURE TO COVER THE BLENDER AND HOLD THE LID - This soup DOES get better over time. Keep covered with plastic, not foil in the refrigerator, or it will pick up other tastes - make sure to cover the pot when cooking the broth and to add more broth to cover all of the solids.

recipes.name: Lime Rice
recipes.instructions:
1. Add rice, water, and pinch of salt to pot, bring to a boil, reduce heat to low and cover 15-18 minutes
2. Fluff rice with a fork, stir in butter, squeeze of lime juice, & zest of lime. Season with Salt and Pepper, top with sliced scallions & sesame seeds

recipes.name: Lobster Pasta

2. When chicken is grilling, simmer marinade and use as a baste

recipes.name: Mousse au Chocolat
ingredients: 1/2 cup plus 1 T granulated sugar, divided
Whipped cream and chocolate curls, for garnish
recipes.instructions:
1. Prepare an ice bath in a large mixing bowl
2. Separate the eggs, placing the whites in the bowl of a mixer and the yolks in a medium heatproof mixing bowl (be sure not to get any yolk in the whites)
3. In a medium pan over medium heat, add 2 inches of water and bring to a simmer (for double boiling)
4. In a heatproof bowl, add the chocolate, butter, and coffee and set over the simmering water; stir until the chocolate is melted and smooth. Remove from heat and set aside
5. In the mixing bowl with the egg yolks, add the 1/2 cup sugar, and vanilla; whisk to combine. Set the bowl over the simmering water and whisk constantly until the mixture is thickened and warm. Cook until it thickly coats the back of a spoon, about 4 minutes. Refrigerate until ready to use
6. In the bowl with the egg whites, whip them (in a mixer) with salt until foamy
7. Gradually add the 1 T of sugar and continue beating until medium peaks form
8. Fold one-third of the whites in into the chocolate mixture until almost completely combined, then fold in the remaining whites in 2 more stages (being careful as folding in to not stir the egg whites and pop all of the bubbles). Stop folding when all of the whites are thoroughly incorporated, the mousse is smooth and the color is even
9. Chill before serving (up to 24 hours) and top with whipped cream and chocolate curls
recipes.comments: Sur La Table cooking class recipe

recipes.name: Nokedli
recipes.instructions:
1. Combine eggs, salt, and water. Beat well.
2. Add flour, a little at a time.
3. Beat the dough until it is consistent in texture and thick enough to stick to the whisk but also that it drips off slowly.
4. Pour dough into a noodle grater over boiling water. When the dumplings float they are done and should be removed immediately.
5. Optionally, rinse with cold water to avoid them sticking together.
recipes.comments: If you use 4 eggs, you need to add about another 1/4 cup of flour to make the mixture nice and thick. Might be worth trying this recipe with only 2 or 3 eggs instead to see if the consistency comes out better

recipes.name: Oven Roasted Vegetables
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450
2. Mix together all liquid ingredients and seasonings in a bowl, whisk
3. Add the vegetables and stir to coat
4. Put on a baking sheet in a single layer, bake for 20 minutes, then stir and bake for another 15 minutes

recipes.name: Pan Roasted Brussels Sprouts
ingredients: 1 to 1-1/2 lbs. Brussels Sprouts (17-20 larger sprouts) 2-3 T Olive Oil 2 T Balsamic Vinegar 1/4 cup water 1/4 cup butter 1/2 cup chopped pecans (or other nuts) Salt & Pepper
recipes.instructions:
1. Wash the Brussels, slice off the stems, remove the yellow outer leaves
2. Cut an x into the stem end, this helps cook everything evenly
3. In a cast iron pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat so that it's almost smoking
4. Saute the brussels until they start to brown
5. Add the balsamic, turn the heat to low and cover
6. After 2 minutes, remove the cover and add 1/4 cup water, cover and cook until they soften (~8-10 minutes)
7. Turn the heat up to high, add the butter and chopped pecans and saute for ~1-2 minutes. Salt and pepper to taste

recipes.name: Parmesan Chicken Rice
recipes.instructions: Haven't made

recipes.name: Pear and Hazelnut Salad with Champagne Vinaigrette
ingredients: Sea Salt and freshly ground black pepper
3 cups (2 small heads) frisee, root trimmed and leaves pulled apart
2 ripe pears, such as Bartlett, peeled, cored, and cut into 1/8 inch thick slices
recipes.instructions:
Vinaigrette:
1. In a medium bowl, add vinegar, shallot, and mustard; whisk to combine
2. While whisking vigorously, slowly drizzle the olive oil into the vinegar mixture (adding more olive oil to make the flavor less acidic
3. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper and stir in chopped parsley (adding in more salt to bring out the flavors)
Salad:
1. Place the frisee, arugula, and pears in a large bowl and toss
2. Drizzle with enough vinaigrette to coat the greens and pear slices
3. Serve on chilled plates, sprinkle with hazelnuts, and serve immediately
recipes.comments:
Sur La Table cooking class recipe
Olive oil can be added liberally or not and it will transform the vinaigrette flavor

recipes.name: Peppermint Bark Ice Cream (homemade, no churn)
recipes.comments: This would be a great idea for make ahead of time and it's different from a standard baked dish

recipes.name: Pollo con Arroz
ingredients: 2 whole chickens, each cut into 8 pieces (about 6 lbs.), trimmed of excess fat (leave the skin)
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Season chicken with salt and pepper. Melt butter with oil in a large ovenproof pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Working in batches, add chicken and cook, turning often, until browned on all sides, 7 to 10 minutes. Remove to a platter.
3. Pour off all but about 2 Tbsp. fat from pot and add onions, celery, carrots, bell peppers and garlic. Cook, stirring often, until softened, approximately 5 minutes. Stir in tomatoes, rice, 1 tsp. salt and 1/2 tsp. pepper. Pour in broth, increase heat to high and bring to a boil.
4. Return chicken to pot, cover and transfer to oven. Cook until chicken and rice are done, about 40 minutes. Season with salt and pepper, if desired. Serve on a large platter garnished with parsley.
recipes.comments:
This makes a LOT of food. Even with the recipe cut in half it will serve 2 or 3 easily.
Be sure to brown the chicken, makes a world of difference.

recipes.name: Potato Gnocchi with Tomato Sauce & Pork
Potatoes Lyonnaise
ingredients: 2lb. Russet Potatoes, peeled and sliced into 1/4" thick slices
recipes.instructions:
1. Cover potatoes with 2" cold water, bring to a boil and let simmer until crisp tender, about 4 minutes. Drain completely
2. Heat butter and olive oil until shimmering, add potatoes and onion (half at a time), cook until golden brown, add the rest of the potatoes and onions, cook another 5-10 minutes until browned and crispy (add more butter as needed). Season with S&P & Parsley

recipes.name: Proper Sunday Roast
recipes.comments: Instant Pot

recipes.name: Quick King Ranch Chicken Skillet
recipes.instructions: From Mom

recipes.name: Red Wine & Cranberry Braised Short Ribs
ingredients: 5 lbs. bone in beef short ribs
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F
2. Season the short ribs with salt and pepper
3. Heat the olive oil in a dutch oven over medium-high heat, sear the ribs on all sides
4. Remove the ribs to a plate and add the onions, shallots, and carrots to the pan cook 5-10 minutes until the onions begin to caramelize
5. Add back the short ribs. Add the wine, broth, tomato paste, brown sugar, thyme, rosemary, bay leaves, and cranberries. Season with salt and pepper, gently stir to combine
6. Cover and transfer to the oven. Cook for 2-1/2 to 3 hours or until the short ribs are tender and falling off the bone
7. Remove the thyme, rosemary, and bay leaves. Serve the ribs over mashed potatoes. Drizzle with the pan sauce
recipes.comments:
This recipe can be made in a slow cooker too, but I tried it in the oven first. To make in a slow cooker:
1. Season the short ribs with salt and pepper. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet, sear the ribs on both sides. Remove the ribs and transfer to the slow cooker
2. Add the onions, shallots, carrots, wine, broth, tomato paste, brown sugar, thyme, rosemary, and bay leaves to the slow cooker.
3. Season with salt and pepper, gently stir to combine
4. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours. During the last 2 hours of cooking, add the cranberries
5. Remove the thyme, rosemary, and bay leaves. Serve the ribs over mashed potatoes. Drizzle with the pan sauce

recipes.name: Remoulade
ingredients: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipes.instructions: Whisk together the mayonnaise, ketchup, capers, relish, mustard and lemon juice in a medium bowl until well combined. Season with salt and pepper.
recipes.comments: Good Remoulade made without horseradish. Could add Worcestershire if needed. Also, hot sauce might be a nice kick.

recipes.name: Reverse Seared Tomahawk Ribeye
ingredients: Salt, Pepper, Garlic Powder, Onion Powder
recipes.instructions:
1. Salt steak and let sit at room temp for a few hours
2. Set Traeger to 225 on super smoke mode, put steak on until internal temp hits 110F (for medium rare) or 20 degrees below final desired temp
3. Let rest for 10-20 mins off the grill before searing
4. Sear over charcoal until desired crust appears
recipes.comments: How long does the Traeger step take /lb?

recipes.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts with Balsamic Vinegar & Honey
Roasted Pork Loin with Grainy Mustard
Roasted Potatoes and Baby Carrots
ingredients: 2-3 lbs. red potatoes, peeled and cut into 2-inch pieces (regular white potatoes work too)
5-6 cups baby carrots (1 package of mixed color baby carrots)
1/3 cup olive oil (enough to coat potatoes & carrots)
recipes.instructions:

4. Rub olive oil on a foil covered baking pan (or just the pan - clean up is worse if the pan isn't lined with foil).
5. Roast in oven for about 30 minutes or until the potatoes are fork-tender, tossing occasionally with a spatula.

recipes.name: Romaine Hearts with Smoked Bacon & Chimichurri
Salmon and Israeli Couscous
ingredients: 1/2 cup finely chopped red bell pepper
1 1/4 lbs. wild Alaskan salmon fillet, skinned and cut into 4 portions
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add couscous, bell pepper, pistachios, shallot and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Cook, stirring frequently, until the couscous is lightly toasted, about 5 minutes. Stir in water. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes. Stir in 1 tablespoon each parsley and oregano.
2. Sprinkle salmon with pepper and the remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt. Place the salmon on top of the couscous, reduce the heat to medium-low, cover and cook until the salmon is cooked through and the water is absorbed, 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Serve garnished with herbs, if desired, and lemon wedges.
recipes.comments: Delicious! Make sure to salt the salmon plenty. Use extra Pistachios. Important to brown the couscous.

recipes.name: Salmon Asparagus Penne with Alfredo Sauce
Sausage Egg Bake

recipes.name: Sausage Meatballs

recipes.name: Sauteed Beet Greens
recipes.instructions:
1. Finely chop the shallot, finely mince the garlic. Cut the stems and leaves into 1 inch pieces and keep the leaves separate
2. Heat the olive oil in a pan on medium high, put the minced garlic and chopped shallot in and cover. Cook for 3 minutes.
3. Add the stems and some water, keep covered and cook for ~10 minutes
4. Add the leaves in and if needed some additional water, cook covered for 5 minutes

recipes.name: Shrimp A La Grecque
ingredients: 2 cups chopped fresh or canned tomatoes, drained
2 T finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley, divided
3 oz. feta chesse, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic; reduce heat to medium-low. Cook until garlic colors, stirring frequently. Add tomatoes, wine, 1 tablespoon parsley, marjoram, salt, and pepper. Cook over medium-high heat until sauce is the thickness of a light purée, stirring occasionally.
2. Add shrimp; cook until shrimp turn pink (about 5 minutes). Add feta, stirring gently (try to keep cheese from crumbling too much). Garnish with remaining parsley. Serve hot.
recipes.comments: Shrimp was fishy, cook down the shrimp earlier with garlic? Maybe chop the shrimp in to smaller pieces first?

recipes.name: Slow Cooker Texas Chili
ingredients: 3 whole dried ancho chiles, stems and seeds removed
2 whole dried guajillo chiles, stems and seeds removed
2lb. beef brisket, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
Topping: Sour cream, shredded cheddar, sliced scallions
recipes.instructions:
1. Place ancho chile & guajillo chiles in a blender, cover with 1 cup of hot water and let sit for 30 minutes, drain half of the liquid and blend
2. Stir flour, chile powder, cumin, oregano, and salt in a bowl. Toss beef cubes in mixture to coat
3.Stir onion, beef broth, tomato puree, fire-roasted tomatoes, jalapeno and chile puree in to slow cooker
4. Add beef mixture to slow cooker and stir to combine all ingredients
5. Cover and cook on low until beef is tender, about 9 hours. Stir in sugar and salt to taste

recipes.name: Smoked Salmon and Goat Cheese Toasts
Snow Pea and Red Onion Salad with Sesame Vinaigrette
ingredients: Kosher Salt (1/4 t) and freshly ground black pepper (1/8 t)
recipes.instructions: Toss all of the ingredients together in a bowl.

recipes.name: Spaghetti & Meatballs
recipes.comments: Need to try and make meatballs with 1lb beef, 3/4 lb pork, 3/4 lb veal

recipes.name: Spicy Sausage Rigatoni con Broccoli Rabe
recipes.instructions:
1. Bring a pot of water to a rolling boil, add quartered broccoli rabe and blanch for 2 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water in a colander
2. Refresh the water and bring the pot to a rolling boil, add Rigatoni and cook till al dente, drain immediately into a colander
3. Cook sausage over medium heat breaking it into small pieces while cooking, cook until browned
4. Bring heat to medium high, add a couple T's of Olive Oil, add the garlic
5. Add the broccoli rabe and stir to mix all ingredients, add chicken broth
6. Add pasta and parmesan and mix to coat all ingredients in sauce
recipes.comments: Must be spicy sausage

recipes.name: Squash & Curried Noodle Soup
ingredients: 2lb. Butternut squash, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes (5 cups)
recipes.instructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil
2. Add butternut squash; reduce heat to medium
3. Simmer, covered, for 5 minutes
4. Add Noodles, simmer, uncovered, 4 to 6 minutes or until noodles are al dente. Drain and set aside.
5. Using the same pot, heat 1 T vegetable oil over medium-high heat
6. Add spices, cook and stir for 1 minute
7. Add broth and coconut milk and bring to a boil
8. Stir in cooked noodles and squash and return to a boil
9. Stir in spinach and season to taste with salt and crushed red pepper
10. Remove from heat and stir in the juice of one lime. Remaining lime can be cut into wedges for serving
recipes.comments: Makes 6 servings

recipes.name: St. Anselm's Iceberg Wedge Salad
ingredients: 6 slices of thick-cut bacon, cut into 1/2 in. pieces
1 Large head of iceberg lettuce, cut and cored into 4 wedges
recipes.instructions:
1. Cook the bacon over medium high heat until crispy. Remove the bacon and place on a paper towel to drain the grease. Pour off all of the bacon grease except for 1/4 Cup and leave in the skillet.
2. Lower the heat and stir in the flour until the flour turns brown. (~4 minutes)
3. Add 1-1/2 Cup of water and the rest of the dressing ingredients. Bring to a simmer.
4. Whisk continuously until the dressing thickens to the consistency of a gravy (~10 minutes)
5. Let the dressing cool slightly until it is warm to the touch and then pour over the wedge, bleu cheese, and bacon crumbles.
recipes.comments: Good with the warm dressing, be sure to core the lettuce. Don't be afraid to let the dressing thicken up by cooking for longer and don't forget to add salt and pepper at the end!

recipes.name: Steak Au Poivre
ingredients: 4 (3/4 - 1 in thick) boneless beef top loin steaks (8-10 oz. each). Fillet Mignon works best.
1/2 stick (1/4 cup) unsalted butter, cut into 4 pieces
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200F
2. Pat steaks dry and season both sides with salt
3. Coarsely crush the peppercorns in a sealed bag (or grab a pepper grinder and grind them extremely coarse). Press the pepper evenly on both sides of the steaks
4. Heat a skillet (cast iron works best) over high heat until hot, add oil, and saute steaks turning once until they are cooked medium-rare
5. Transfer steaks to a platter and keep warm while cooking the sauce
6. If there's a lot of fat, pour it off the skillet, add the shallots and half of the butter (2 T) and cook over low heat. Stirring to scrape up the brown bits left from the steaks and cooking 3-5 minutes until the shallots are browned
7. Add the cognac (may be a fire) and boil until the liquid is reduced to a glaze (~2-3 minutes).
8. Add the cream and whatever meat juices accumulated on the platter and bring to a boil. Stir continuously until reduced in half (~3-5 mins)
9. Add the remaining butter and cook over low heat until the butter is melted and the sauce is consistent
10. Pour the sauce over the steaks
recipes.comments: Crushing the peppercorns is the biggest pain, highly suggest using a very coarse pepper grinder. Also, the steaks should be cooked closer to rare so that they juice on the platter and you can incorporate the blood into the sauce.

recipes.name: Steak topping Mushrooms
ingredients: Dried Herbs: Parsley, Oregano, Thyme, Rosemary
recipes.instructions:
1. Add butter and olive oil to pan, melt butter and add mushrooms
2. Coat mushrooms in butter and season with herbs and cumin (+ salt/pepper)
3. Cook on medium high heat for ~10 minutes until they start to cook down
4. Add onions to pan and cook until reduced down
5. Optionally, add Red Wine and reduce down
6. Once the mixture is cooked down, add the garlic and saute for 2 minutes, remove from heat and toss on top of steaks

recipes.name: Sticky's Buffalo Balsamic Maple Sauce
recipes.instructions:

⅔ cup Frank's RedHot
½ cup unsalted butter

¼t Worcestershire sauce

salt to taste
Bring to a simmer, let cool

recipes.name: Sticky's Cray Sauce

recipes.name: Sticky's Mac Sauce
recipes.instructions:
1. Add cheese and cornstarch to large bowl. Toss to combine. Transfer to medium saucepan
2. Add 1 cup (8oz) evaporated milk, jalapenos and hot sauce. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly with whisk until melted, bubbly, and thickened, about 5 minutes
3. Mixture will look thin and grainy at first but will thicken and come together after heating. Thin to desired consistency with additional evaporated milk. Serve immediately with fries, tortilla chips, burgers, or hot dogs.
4. To reheat the sauce, microwave it on high heat, stopping and stirring every 30 seconds, until it's fully melted.
recipes.comments: Cheddar cheese sauce w/diced jalapeño; can add more cheese or different cheese to change it up. Otherwise, this is a standard cheese sauce that is great in mac n cheese.

recipes.name: Sticky's Sassy BBQ Sauce
recipes.instructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a heavy saucepan and place over medium heat
2. Whisk to combine and stir frequently, bringing mixture to a boil
3. Lower to simmer and cook for about 15 minutes, continuing to stir often
4. Cool to room temperature and store in an airtight container in the refrigerator up to 3 months
recipes.comments: Sweet and tangy bbq sauce

recipes.name: Sticky's Sauce
recipes.instructions: Stirred in a bowl
recipes.comments:
Creamy white bbq sauce; can be done with horseradish too
1 cup mayonnaise
¼ cup apple cider vinegar
2T brown sugar
1T brown mustard
1t lemon juice
1t prepared horseradish
½t salt
½t black pepper
¼t cayenne pepper
Tried a combo of both and it's mostly mayo and vinegar tasting and too liquid. Added a lot more garlic powder and onion powder as well as a 1t of corn starch and blended it. Needs work to taste anything like Sticky's sauce.

recipes.name: Sticky's Vampire Aioli Sauce
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350F
2. Trim off the top of the head of garlic to expose cloves. Drizzle with olive oil. Sprinkle salt and black pepper on top. Wrap in aluminum foil
3. Bake until garlic feels soft when lightly pressed, about 1 hour. Unwrap and cool, 5 to 10 minutes. Refrigerate until chilled, 30 minutes to 1 hour
4. Pull out individual garlic cloves; mash with a fork until creamy.
5. Add mayonnaise, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and cayenne; mix well until blended
6. Refrigerate until flavors combine, at least 1 hour
recipes.comments: Creamy roasted garlic dip; patience, the garlic takes time to integrate with the mayo.

recipes.name: Sticky's Wasabi Aioli Sauce
recipes.instructions: Stirred
recipes.comments: Patience, the wasabi takes time to integrate with the mayo. Also, use horseradish based wasabi for the kick.

recipes.name: Sushi Rice
ingredients: 3 Cups of Japanese Sushi Rice (2 cups)
recipes.instructions:
1. Rinse the rice under cold water for 1-2 minutes until there is no more starch coming out of it. Very important step!
2. Place the rice in a pot gently and fill the pot with water so that the ratio is 1.15:1 in favor of the water
3. Cook the rice on high heat at first until it comes to a boil, stirring every minute
4. Once it has reached a boil, turn the heat down to the minimum setting and cover. Try not to open for at least 10 minutes. Only stir the rice with a wooden spoon (plastic spoon works too), never use metal!
5. Check that the rice is very very dry, checking every minute after the first 10 and gently stirring to ensure the rice isn't sticking/burning on the bottom of the pot
6. Gently remove the rice from the pot and place in a wooden bowl (plastic works too), NOT metal. Don't scrape the bottom of the pot as it may damage the rice or loosen burnt rice
7. Mix the vinegar, sugar, and salt in a small sauce pan over medium heat until the solids dissolve
8. Add to the rice immediately (while the rice is still warm) and stir gently in to the rice
9. Let the rice cool before making any sushi
recipes.comments: Instant pot, high pressure, 10 mins, ratio 1.1:1 (water:rice)

recipes.name: Sushi Roll
ingredients: 3/8 Cup of uncooked rice per Maki roll 3/4 Cup of uncooked rice makes ~25-30 pieces of Nigiri Sushi ~2 oz. raw fish make 1 Maki roll ~12 oz. raw fish make ~20 pieces of Sushi 2 Avocados was more than enough for 8 rolls (1 avocado for 5 rolls is plenty) 1 Cucumber sliced thinly was more than enough for 8 rolls Seaweed Nori Sheets (1 sheet makes two rolls) Wasabi Sliced, Pickled Ginger Chopped Scallions
recipes.instructions:
Making Maki:
1. Make the sushi rice
2. Wrap the bamboo rolling mat with saran wrap. This will help a lot in the cleaning process and will help with sticky rice. Use the flat side as the top.
3. Take a seaweed wrap (split in half) and put a 1/4 inch of rice on the rough side of the seaweed. Compress the rice and ensure it is evenly spread across the whole seaweed. You will need to have a bowl of water with a little rice vinegar in it to wet your hands and the knife when dealing with the rice. The wetter the better
4. Once the rice is on the seaweed, if you are making inside out sushi you should flip the seaweed over so that the rice is on the bottom and touching the bamboo mat
5. Add a piece of sliced fish (~3/4" tall and wide square piece), 3-4 thinly sliced avocado slices, and 2 thin cucumber slices to the edge of the roll
6. Gently start rolling, not being afraid to squeeze the roll tight to ensure everything is nice and tight
7. Once the roll is formed, wet the sushi knife and cut in to 8-10 pieces
Making Nigiri:
1. Wet your hands with the vinegar & water solution
2. Grab a small piece of rice and form it in to a small rectangular oval
3. Add a small piece of wasabi to the rice
4. Place a piece of thinly sliced raw fish over the top
recipes.comments:
Made 4.5-5 Maki Rolls with 8 oz. of Scottish Salmon
Made 2 Maki Rolls and 6 pieces of sushi Nigiri with 4 oz. Tuna
Made ~20 pieces of sushi Nigiri with about half of a 20 oz. piece of Irish Salmon
Irish Salmon is better than Scottish Salmon
Make sure to cut out any irregular pieces of Tuna, very chewy if you leave it.

recipes.name: Thai Minced Chicken Lettuce Cups
ingredients: 1 large head iceberg or butter lettuce
2 T finely chopped fresh ginger (you'll need a thick 2-inch piece)
3 T fish sauce (2T is better to not have that rancid smell)
3 T freshly squeezed lime juice, from 1-1/2 limes
2 large scallions, white and green parts, finely sliced
recipes.instructions:
1. Fill a large bowl with cold water. Place the head of lettuce on a cutting board; cut off the stem, then cut around the inner core of the lettuce and remove (do not cut all the way through the lettuce; just deep enough to remove the core). Discard the flimsy, ragged outer leaves and then place the head of lettuce in the bowl of water. Gently pull apart the leaves, then place them on a paper towel to dry. Cut any large leaves in half. Chill the lettuce cups in refrigerator until ready to serve. (This step is optional, you can just cut the core of the lettuce, rinse it in a strainer and serve right away)
2. Heat the oil in large sauté pan over medium heat. Add the onion and ginger and cook, stirring frequently, until soft, 4-5 minutes
3. Add the garlic and cook 1 minute more
4. Add the ground chicken and turn the heat up to high. Cook, breaking up the meat with a wooden spoon, until partially cooked through, about 3 minutes
5. Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, brown sugar, lime zest, lime juice and red pepper flakes and continue cooking, stirring frequently to break up the meat, until the chicken is cooked through, 5-6 minutes more
6. Off the heat, stir in the scallions, mint and nuts. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Spoon into lettuce cups and serve with optional garnishes.

recipes.name: Thyme & Rosemary Butter Steak
ingredients: Ribeye or NY Strip or Fillet

3. An hour before cooking, remove the steaks from the fridge and season
4. If not grilling, preheat the oven to 425

6. Put pan into the oven and cook until complete
7. When steaks are slightly less than medium rare, pull them off the heat and brush both sides with the butter, then cover with foil for 10-15 minutes to let them settle

recipes.name: Truffle Caprese Risotto
recipes.instructions:
1. Let chicken warm for 15 mins on counter, preheat oven to 400F
2. Rub truffle oil on foil lined baking sheet, salt and pepper chicken thighs & bake for 60-70 mins. De-bone and dice to mix in
3. Heat chicken broth to simmer over medium heat
4. In a dutch oven, heat olive oil and onions over medium heat for 5 mins, add garlic and mushrooms and stir (keeping covered) for 5 mins
5. Add risotto, diced tomatoes, pinch of sugar and stir for 5 mins (keeping covered)
6. Add wine and stir for 5 mins (keeping covered)
7. Squeeze lemon juice in and stir, ladle in simmering chicken broth one scoop at a time stir until gone (20-25 mins)
8. Add Basil, halved tomatoes, mozzarella pearls, and diced chicken
9. Drizzle balsamic glaze, add fresh shaved parmesan on top

recipes.name: Truffle Ricotta Stuffed Pasta
ingredients: 12oz Tuscan Pasta Sauce made with Sangiovese

2. Bring large pot of water to a boil
3. Mix Truffle-Hazelnut spread with Ricotta, Olive Oil, Salt & Pepper in a small bowl until desired thickness
4. Cook pasta till al dente. Drain and cool.
5. Stuff each shell with the Truffle Ricotta spread and place closed side down on a large glass baking dish
6. Pour sauce over top of shells
7. Pour a generous amount of grated parmesan chesse over the dish
8. Bake 10-15 minutes
9. Let cool and serve with another grate of parmesan cheese
recipes.comments:
More sauce needed to cover a full pound
Don't overcook in the oven
More Ricotta needed to fill all of the shells
Olive Oil quantity is a guess
Where to find this truffle hazelnut spread? Has pinenuts and Champignon mushrooms in it too

recipes.name: Tuna Crudo with Dukkah & Sizzling Olive Oil
Turkey Pot Pie/Casserole
ingredients: 1 box Pillsbury refrigerated pie crusts, softened as directed
Optional: leftover gravy, leftover stuffing, leftover mashed potatoes
recipes.instructions:
1. Heat oven to 425°F. Make pie crusts as directed on box for Two-Crust Pie, using 9-inch glass pie plate. Also works in a rectangular pan.
2. In 2-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add onion; cook 2 minutes, stirring frequently, until tender. Stir in flour, salt and pepper until well blended. Gradually stir in broth and milk, cooking and stirring until bubbly and thickened.
3. Stir in turkey and mixed vegetables. Remove from heat. Spoon into crust-lined pie plate. Top with second crust; seal edge and flute. Cut slits in several places in top crust. Optionally, just put crusts on top of the filling.
4. Bake 30 to 40 minutes or until crust is golden brown. During last 15 to 20 minutes of baking, cover edge of crust with strips of foil to prevent excessive browning. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
recipes.comments: Great for leftover thanksgiving food.

recipes.name: Twice Baked Potatoes
recipes.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
2. Bake potatoes in preheated oven for 1 hour
3. Meanwhile, place bacon in a large, deep skillet. Cook over medium high heat until evenly brown. Drain, crumble and set aside
4. When potatoes are done allow them to cool for 10 minutes. Slice potatoes in half lengthwise and scoop the flesh into a large bowl leaving about 1/4 inch of flesh so the potato maintains it's shape; save skins
5. To the potato flesh add sour cream, butter, salt, pepper, 1/2 cup cheese, 1/2 the green onions, and milk (start adding 1/2 cup of milk but you may not need to add it all depending on the consistency you want. You don't want them too runny). Mix with a hand mixer until well blended and creamy
6. Spoon the mixture into the potato skins. Top each with remaining cheese and bacon. If making ahead of time, refrigerate here
7. Bake for another 15-20 minutes at 350 degrees. Add 10 minutes if you refrigerated ahead of time. Sprinkle with green onions and serve

recipes.name: Ultimate Brisket Burger w/Jalapeño Aioli

recipes.name: Vietnamese Lemongrass Chicken
ingredients: 1-1/2 lbs boneless, skinless chicken breast/thigh, cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces
2 fresh lemongrass stalks, tender inner white bulbs only, minced
recipes.instructions:
This feeds
2.
1. In a bowl, combine the fish sauce, garlic, curry powder, salt, and 1-1/2 t of sugar. Add the chicken meat to coat.
2. In a skillet, mix the remaining 2 T sugar with 1 T of water and cook over high heat, stirring until the sugar is dissolved. Cook without stirring until a deep amber caramel forms. Remove from the heat and stir in the remaining 2 T of water. Transfer to a bowl. This will be a thick Caramel substance.
3. Heat a wok over high heat. Add the oil and heat until shimmering. Add the lemongrass, shallot, and chillies. Stir-fry until fragrant. Add the chicken and caramel and stir-fry until chicken is cooked through and sauce thickens.
4. Serve with steamed white rice or fried rice. Green beans work too.
recipes.comments: Very good, caramel must be very thick. Becomes difficult to transfer, but adds a LOT of value for the meal. I also made this without the fish sauce, chillies, and lemongrass and it was still very good.

recipes.name: Hibiscus Margarita
recipes.instructions:
1. To make the hibiscus tea concentrate, bring 3 cups water to a boil, add hibiscus tea, stir, remove from heat and let steep for 30 minutes.
2. Strain into a jar or glass container using a fine mesh strainer and add sweetener to taste. I found 1/3 cup was about the right amount, using 1/2 agave nectar, 1/2 cane sugar. Stir to dissolve and let cool.
3. To make two margaritas, add ice, cooled hibiscus tea concentrate, lime juice, tequila and simple syrup or agave nectar to a cocktail shaker and shake vigorously to combine
4. Pour over two glasses with ice. Salt or sugar rim is optional. Garnish with lime wedge. If too strong, dilute with a splash of sparkling water
5. Garnish with Mint sprig or Basil Leaf?
recipes.comments: Don't be afraid to add a little extra tequila to each drink. Agave in the drink is going to take the tang away without sweetening, simple syrup is going to take the tang away and provide a little sweetness.

ingredients: 1 cup Hamilton Jamaican Black Rum (Gosling Black Seal)

recipes.instructions:
If you can't find the exact rums, use black and aged rums
Mix all together in a large container (milk can be cold, must be whole milk)
Do not stir, the curds do the filtering not the paper towel
Let sit on counter for ~4 hours
Strain through coffee filter or paper towel, first few mins will not be clear, pour back through filter when clear liquid starts to come through. Better to use a funnel type strainer to gather the curds
Store in fridge or cool dark place (shelf stable)
Serve over large ice cube

recipes.name: Piña Colada Clarified Milk Punch
recipes.instructions:
1. Add milk to a large glass bowl and set aside
2. Mix remaining ingredients into a pitcher
3. Slowly pour punch mixture into the milk and gently stir until it curdles
4. Cover and let rest for at least an hour at room temp
5. Pour a few ounces through through a wet coffee filter or cheese cloth to create a base of curds to help with filtering
6. Pour those first few ounces back over the top of the filter to ensure a clean product
7. Pour remaining punch slowly into the filter, refilling as needed. Total filter time is around 3 hours
8. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator indefinitely
9. Serve in a chilled rocks glass over ice

2. Add several small ice cubes, then rye whiskey, Peychaud's bitters, and Angostura bitters. Stir well.
